caribbean.headline: Caribbean Winds Rise
caribbean.paragraph: St. Maarten is experiencing 21 kt winds with 4.7 ft wave heights and an 80% rain probability, while San Juan has 15 kt winds, making for a notable weather day in the Eastern Caribbean. I expect the strong easterly winds to continue impacting St. Maarten, with less than 10% rain probability not being a concern, as the high 80% rain probability dominates the forecast.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Storm Hits Marseille
mediterranean.paragraph: Marseille is experiencing 100% rain probability with winds reaching 22 kt and wave heights of 7.5 ft, while Lisbon has less than 10% rain probability with max winds of 14 kt. I expect these conditions to impact maritime activities in the region, particularly in Marseille where the higher winds and wave heights may lead to a Small Craft Advisory.
